column2: – Unique ID for each reservation record.
– Unique ID for each user who made the reservation.
– Type of user (Resident, Volunteer, Nonprofit Partner).
– Membership level of the user (Standard, Frequent Borrower, New User).
– Age category of the user (18–24, 25–34, etc.).
– Area where the user belongs or lives.
– Unique ID for the pickup hub.
– Name of the pickup hub.
– Type of hub (Staffed, Staffed + Volunteers, Volunteer-heavy).
– Unique ID for the borrowed item.
– Category of the item (Tools, Camping, Sports, etc.).
– Specific name of the item borrowed.
– Date when the reservation was created.
– Date and time scheduled for pickup.
– Status of pickup (Picked up, No-show, Cancelled).
– Actual date and time when item was picked up (if picked up).
– Number of days the item was borrowed for.
– Scheduled date and time for return.
– Return outcome (On time, Late, Not returned).
– Actual return date and time.
– Number of hours late (if returned late).
– Number of parts expected to be returned with the item.
– Number of parts actually returned.
– Indicator (1 = missing parts, 0 = complete return).
– Indicator (1 = damaged, 0 = not damaged).
– Level of damage (Minor, Moderate, Severe).
– Indicator (1 = cleaning required, 0 = not required).
– Indicator (1 = cleaning completed, 0 = not completed).
– Time (in minutes) staff spent during checkout process.
– Time (in minutes) staff spent during return/check-in process.
– Number of people waiting at the hub during that time.
– Demand level during reservation (Low, Medium, High).
– Type of period (Regular, Weekend, Holiday/Peak).
– Indicator (1 = item available at reservation time, 0 = not available).
– Indicator (1 = notifications enabled, 0 = disabled).
– Number of reminders sent to the user.
– Indicator (1 = issue reported in app, 0 = no report).
– Indicator (1 = support ticket created, 0 = none).
– Type of support ticket (Missing parts, Damage, Late return dispute, App issue).
– Method used for logging (Electronic log, Handwritten notes, Mixed).
– Length of staff notes recorded (number of characters).
– Monetary penalty charged in USD.
– Indicator (1 = reservation cancelled, 0 = not cancelled).
– Reason for cancellation (if cancelled).
